title: GPU f64 grad accumulation silently round-trips to CPU (sibling of #788)
description: ferrotorch-core/src/tensor.rs:566 — gradient accumulation for f64 GPU tensors hits 'is_f32 &&' and falls through to CPU host-detour path, despite add_f64 being implemented on CudaBackendImpl. Same shape as #788: a forced f32-only branch causes the f64 path to skip the working override. Fix: extend the GPU branch to handle f64 via backend.add_f64().
